message:
fix(formula): distinguish "no default" from default="" in VarDef

VarDef.Default was a plain string, so Go zero value "" was
indistinguishable from an explicit default="". This caused 50+ formula
variables with default="" (meaning "optional, skip if empty") to be
treated as required, breaking gt sling for operational formulas.

Change Default from string to *string: nil = no default specified,
non-nil (including &"") = has explicit default. Mechanical change
across all consumer sites with consistent nil-check pattern.

Fixes: steveyegge/gastown#1551

Co-authored-by: julianknutsen <julianknutsen@users.noreply.github.com>
